name: EPDM D-Hollow / Square Bumper
shortDescription: EPDM rubber D-profile and square-hollow bumpers for column and wall protection.
longDescription: Extruded EPDM rubber bumper profile, hollow-cored for cushioning, supplied by the metre and cut to length for columns, wall edges and structural steel that need continuous impact protection rather than a single point bumper.

images.alt: EPDM D-Hollow / Square Bumper supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
